title: anatherum virginicum subvar. glaziovii
intro: Anatherum virginicum subvar. glaziovii, also known as Eastern Indian Grass or Little Bluestem, is a type of grass native to North America, particularly in the eastern regions. The medicinal properties of Anatherum virginicum subvar. glaziovii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Anatherum virginicum subvar. glaziovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
